title: Pakistan beat India in Champions Trophy final
summary: Pakistan defeated India by 180 runs in the final held in Dubai.
body: In a one-sided final, Pakistan beat India to lift the trophy.

title: Prime Minister announces new education budget
summary: The PM announced a 200 billion rupee education budget for 2025.
body: The federal government will allocate 200 billion rupees to education.

title: Karachi reports record monsoon rainfall
summary: Karachi received 120mm of rain in 24 hours, breaking a decade record.
body: Urban flooding affected several districts of Karachi after record rain.

title: Stock exchange hits all-time high
summary: The KSE-100 index crossed 120000 points for the first time.
body: The benchmark KSE-100 index closed at a record 120000 points.

title: New polio vaccination drive launched nationwide
summary: A nationwide polio drive aims to vaccinate 40 million children.
body: Health authorities launched a campaign targeting 40 million children.

title: Old earthquake article from 2019
summary: A 5.2 magnitude earthquake struck the northern region in 2019.
body: The earthquake caused minor damage and no casualties in 2019.
